markdown:
# Boon of Speed

You gain the following benefits.

## Escape Artist

As a [[bonus_action Action]], you can take the [[disengage]] action, which also ends the [[grappled]] condition on you.

## Quickness

Your [[speed]] increases by 30 feet.
